rjw.HediffDef_SexPart.label: left breast
rjw.HediffDef_SexPart.description: Left breast. Used by Equal Milking for independent left/right milk pool.

rjw.HediffDef_SexPart.label: right breast
rjw.HediffDef_SexPart.description: Right breast. Used by Equal Milking for independent left/right milk pool.
